title: [FIRRTL] (mem) sv.alwaysff should be in a non-procedural region

features.name: always_ff procedural block placement
features.description: Code should include an always_ff procedural block used in a context where it may be incorrectly placed in a procedural region during MLIR lowering

features.name: FIRRTL memory with multiple write ports and clock assignment
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL memory construct with multiple write ports where clock assignments to ports may trigger sv.alwaysff in wrong region
features.snippet:
mem tmp153:
  data-type => SInt<4>
  depth => 9
  read-latency => 1
  write-latency => 2
  reader => r0
  writer => w0
  writer => w1
tmp153.w0.clk <= clock
